Project Description: Apple Inc. is an American multinational technology company, known for its consumer electronics, software and online services. Apple's product lineup includes portable and home hardware like the iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Mac, and Apple TV; and various software and services including Apple Pay and iCloud, as well as subscription based streaming services like Apple Music and Apple TV. They needed a Digital Transformation and Migration from their existing legacy SAP ECC to the latest S/4 HANA landscape for leveraging the capabilities for a more robust and efficient supply chain, resources and planning. Being considered as one of the biggest Digital Transformation Projects in the world.
details: Code Remediation on RICEF objects for S/4 HANA Migration, ATC fixes, Code Vulnerability fixes. Proactively identified potential failures and provided fixes for the same (sy-dbcount logic failure, BDC failure for VL02N serialization SNOTE – 3661899 etc).
Performance tuning and analysis with fixes using code pushdown techniques for improved overall performance in few instances up to 95% lower processing time and resource utilization.
POC on RAP application utilizing BTP cloud connectors and external API call using consumption model.
Developed feature addition to programs utilizing SPTA framework and in some cases use standard parallel processing using NEW TASK and manually handling thread utilization using parallel generators
Functionality implementations for Custom free style Ui5 application using BAS and git for version control.
Providing peer review lowering cases of rework and retest confirmation, resulting in effective sprint cycles delivering targets with minimal bottle necks.
Go-Live cutover activities, post go-live warranty support, tickets handling, bug fixes and support.
Mentoring junior developers with the ways of workings and KT sessions for smooth delegation of work all while coordinating with leads and onsite team.
Worked at client location in a client facing role, building rapport and increased collaboration with cross functional and multi-cultural teams while adhering to agile methodologies.

Project Description: Sahara International Petrochemical Company, is a Saudi Arabian petrochemical manufacturer. It produces and markets a variety of products, including methanol, polymers, and other chemicals, serving industries like construction, automotive, and pharmaceuticals. It also has a trading and marketing subsidiary SIPCHEM EUROPE SA. They needed a Digital Transformation in their SAP landscape utilizing RISE with SAP, incorporating SAP’s clean core principles
details: Created Odata service for journal entry reversal using BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_REV_POST which gets triggered when request from service now is pushed to SAP system and the odata service should provide a confirmation response post successful completion

Worked on existing Vendor Balance Confirmation report for Internal form & Auditor Form. On the basis of the user type one of these need to be generated and sent as an email using the existing utility classes.
Created Odata service used for Asset creation using BAPI_FIXEDASSET_CREATE1 when a request is raised in service now.
Worked on creation of Custom Loan, precious Lease reports programs for complex business needs.

Developed adobe form of Delivery note with details of shipping related details and conditions, material classification, weight and volume along with section for acknowledgement of receipt of goods confirmation signature list. Added the report as an output type that gets triggered during PGI
Provided support working with cross functional teams during the integration testing. Debugging issues of P2, P3 and providing quick fixes, solutions and workarounds during warranty phase.
Documentation of the technical objects along with business requirements and provided peer code review
Coordinated with cross functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

Project Description: Telia Company is a leading Telecommunications Company across the Nordics and Baltic region. It has businesses and services in Networking, Media, Device Sales and Insurance etc. For diversifying and scaling up their horizontal offerings, business was looking for enhancing their existing process with feature addition and newer requirements.
details: Coordinated with client for requirements and proposing future proof technical solutions which will align with their future requirements leading to less code changes and saving budget.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.
Expanded my CDS, Odata and Fiori skillset working on requirements and proposing solutions.
Coordinated with onshore and offshore teams to ensure timely delivery of project milestones.
Involved in code reviews, testing, and deployment activities to ensure high-quality deliverables.
Worked on Agile methodologies, participating in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.
Actively participated in code reviews, ensuring code quality and adherence to best practices.
Coordinated with cross functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.
Mentored junior developers, providing guidance and support to enhance their skills and knowledge.
Documentation of Technical Specs and Design documents.
Proposed technical Solution and Developed custom program and apps for (few but not limited to):
Enhancing standard process of BR creation for custom item splitting and output determination.
Mass Cancellation of Billing documents using BAPI which uses CDS to determine relevant documents and exposing the program as a Transactional Fiori Application
Enhancing custom push & pull order UI5 application for feature addition.
Updating Sales Document Flow to show customer required complex additional documents for client specific processes for better process traceability
Automatic Reversal process and invoice cancellation based on user actions in standard programs as per requirement
Automating complex client specific Delivery process (PGI, User status change, BR creation, Sales Document Flow update) by implementing several enhancements of standard programs
Creation of custom format business reports which need to be downloaded as excel using xml transformations and enhancing existing transformations as per requirement
Addition of custom validation and custom messages in contract t-codes and LTMC process to be shown during Validation and simulation for smoother process of data migration
Automated generation of Tax Report in custom format downloadable in both text and pdf utilizing CDS views as per business requirements
Batch job for Handling and transfer of files between AL11 paths based on file name string
Bug fixing, Debug for analysis and providing technical solutions to the functional team as workaround for defects
Coordinating with new joiners for easier onboarding into the project and system environment

Project Description: L’Oreal has its line of Personal Care and Cosmetic products which it produces and supply under their brand. The business and product data are managed using their custom SAP Fiori /HANA Applications which need to be developed and enhanced as and when requirements arise.
details: Designed and implemented CDS views using Associations, joins, Parameters
Developed and Enhanced Odata service methods as per requirements
Implemented custom validations and custom error handling messages to be shown in Manage Product Master Fiori App
Developed custom report and exposing it as a transactional Fiori App
Coordinating with client users and business and proposing technical solution for requirements
Debugging for analysis, solution proposals and Bug fixes

Project Description: Unilever has products in 3 main areas i.e. Foods & Refreshments (beverages and ice cream), Home Care, and Beauty & Personal Care. Whose R&D data is managed using their customized SAP PLM Fiori apps for recipe, specification and BOMs.
details: Expanded my SAP RICEF skill set as part of Specification and Recipe Management in the field of PLM for process industries.
Worked on the custom programs and Issue solving in BOM generation and recipe management.
Replicating the defects in the lower system and documenting Detailed Analysis.
Resolved priority tickets of P2, P3 & P4 without any SLA breach in SNOW with Workaround / solution in the areas of -
Specification/ Recipe Creation issues
Object sets & Search app UI / Functionality
Custom Process Flow Diagram Tool
Custom Reporting issues
BOM Creation & BOM IDOC Transfer
Interface monitoring using Postman tool
Creation of custom tables as per client requirements

Coordinated with PLM R&D owners and supply chain as part of Material Life cycle Management team running Data cleansing process for each quarter for removing the unutilized non stock materials, their specifications, recipes and linked BOMs

Project Description: Bombardier Aviation is a commercial aircraft manufacturing subsidiary of Bombardier Inc. During its partnership with AIRBUS for a new Cseries program, they needed their PLM platform with custom enhancements, custom business reports, programs for business process execution and later with their acquisition of TRIUMPH’s wing program they needed to extend their existing processes to the new wing manufacturing division.
details: Worked on various Workbench objects.
Creation of DDIC objects and maintaining TVARVC entries used in custom programs
Solution Design from requirements gathered and documenting Solution Document & Detailed Document
Debugging complex scenarios by understanding functional processes for implementing implicit & explicit BADI enhancements in custom and standard programs
Designing custom report programs using FM ALV, OOPS ALV for business reports
Developing custom programs for process execution, custom layouts using Adobe Forms
Usage of OOPS in custom utility class creation for authorization checks using auth objects for segregation of data in standard programs as per business requirement
Creation of custom programs to extend material to plants using BAPI.
Automating creation of data using eCATT or SAP script recorder
Creating use case documents and performing Unit and integration testing in lower systems
